meta.title: Krytsia — AI-first VPP and EMS platform
meta.description: The first VPP + EMS platform with AI agents in Ukraine. Four expert AI agents inside your cabinet: forecasting, market, dispatch, battery optimisation. Live integration with day-ahead, intraday and balancing markets.

hero.subline: Krytsia — Virtual Power Plant + Energy Management Platform for Ukraine. Four AI expert agents inside your cabinet: forecasting, market, dispatch, battery optimisation.

agentShowcase.eyebrow: AI agents by Krytsia · only here
agentShowcase.subline: No other VPP platform in Ukraine offers this. Each agent sees the same live data as your cabinet — ask in your language or by voice and get an answer linked to the exact rows in the database.

personaAIHelper.description: Ask in your language or by voice. Answers link to your live data.

scenarios.heading: Pick your scenario
scenarios.subline: One product — three cabinets for three market roles. Live data, multi-tenant via X-Tenant-Id header.

producer.title: I'm a producer
producer.description: Solar, wind, gas-engine or hybrid plant. Forecasting, day-ahead/intraday trading, optimisation against caps and imbalances.

ci.title: I'm a business (C&I)
ci.description: Factory, agro-holding, retail. Minimise your bill: tariff plans, load shifting, group procurement, demand-response services.

storage.title: I'm a storage owner
storage.description: Electrochemical storage as an asset. Arbitrage, balancing market, system services. We'll find your weekly strategy with the best IRR.

footer.tagline: © 2026 Krytsia. The first VPP + EMS platform with AI agents in Ukraine.

samples: How much of my own generation did I consume?
When should I charge the battery?

agentChat.emptyPrompt: I'll help you with analytics on real data. Examples:
agentChat.voiceUnavailable: Voice is not available in your browser
